message:
feat(mail): add Human Overseer messaging CLI for agent communication

Implement comprehensive Human Overseer CLI interface for Agent Mail,
enabling humans to communicate with AI agents directly from the command line.
This is the CLI equivalent of the Agent Mail web UI at /mail/{project}/overseer/compose.

New Commands (internal/cli/mail.go):

ntm mail send - Send Human Overseer messages to agents:
- Messages come from special "HumanOverseer" identity
- Bypass contact policies (humans can always reach agents)
- Auto-inject preamble telling agents to prioritize instructions
- All messages marked as high importance
- Support --to for specific recipients or --all for broadcast
- Support --file to read message body from file
- Support --thread for conversation continuity
- Opens $EDITOR when no message body provided

ntm mail read - Mark messages as read:
- Works with specific message IDs or filters
- --urgent flag to only mark urgent messages
- --from flag to filter by sender
- --all flag to mark all matching messages
- --limit to cap messages considered
- JSON output support for automation

ntm mail ack - Acknowledge messages:
- Same interface as read command
- Sets both read_ts and ack_ts for lightweight replies
- Proper handling of ack_required messages

Shared Infrastructure:
- parseMessageIDs() for converting string IDs to ints
- mailAction enum for read/ack action types
- markSummary struct for JSON output consistency
- mailJSONWriter() and encodeJSONResult() helpers
- resolveAgentName() for pane-to-agent name mapping
- looksLikeAgentName() for AdjectiveNoun name validation
- openEditorForMessage() for $EDITOR integration

Inbox Refactoring (internal/cli/mail_inbox.go):
- Extract shared helpers to mail.go
- Add --json flag for explicit JSON output
- Use shared client creation pattern
- Cleaner separation of concerns

Test Coverage:
- TestMailMarkJSONPartialSuccess verifying mixed success/failure handling
- MockMailClient for inbox testing without server dependency
- Tests for filter combinations and edge cases

Example Usage:
  ntm mail send myproject --to GreenCastle "Please review the API changes"
  ntm mail send myproject --all "Checkpoint: sync and report status"
  ntm mail send myproject --to BlueLake --thread FEAT-123 "Status update"
  ntm mail read mysession --urgent --all
  ntm mail ack mysession 1234 5678

This enables human operators to participate in Agent Mail coordination
workflows alongside AI agents, providing oversight and direction.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
